author: Sergey Pekarchik
angelblock.rendelithic_armor.desc3: Wearing the full rendelithic set provides full protection against fire and lava
angelblock.diamithic_armor.desc1: Purpose: Caves. Fighting against bosses (Ender Dragon, Wither, Warden)
angelblock.diamithic_armor.desc3: Has full protection against lightning bolt
angelblock.lapis_armor.desc3: Fire and magma set Wither effect for 30 sec
angelblock.limonite_armor.desc3: Regenerating during rain. Partial bite immunity. Full protection: plant thorns, puffer fish and magic
angelblock.super_armor.desc3: Combines all advantages of rendelithic, diamithic, lapis, limonite and flying armor
angelblock.flying_armor.desc3: Can't fly during rain or if chestplate damage > 50%. Can't use fireworks to speed up
item.angelblock.diamithic_chestplate_wit: Diamithic Chestplate With Strength Boost And Fall Protection
item.angelblock.diamithic_helmet_with_de: Diamithic Helmet With Creeper Detector And Night Vision
item.angelblock.limonite_leggings_with_r: Limonite Leggings With Health Booster and Regenerator
item.angelblock.limonite_helmet_with_det: Limonite Helmet With Creeper Detector And Night Vision
item.angelblock.super_boots_with_strengt: Super Boots With Jump Boost and Sea Power
item.angelblock.super_leggings_with_rege: Super Leggings With Health Booster and Regenerator
item.angelblock.obsidian_powder.desc: Can be got from Cracked Obsidian
item.angelblock.endstone_powder.desc2: Can be got from Cracked Endstone
item.angelblock.diamond_powder.desc: Can be got by breaking Diamond Blocks with Splash Destroying Potion
item.angelblock.vesicular_terracotta.des: Can be found in Desert Pyramids
item.angelblock.flax_fibre.desc: Can be found in Jungle Temples or Woodland Mansions
item.angelblock.rendelithic_armor_upgrad: Can be found in villages and Nether Fortresses

item.angelblock.limonite_tool_upgrade_ki: Can be found in villages, Woodland Mansions and Jungle Temples
item.angelblock.super_tool_upgrade_kit.d: Can be found in Buried Treasures
item.angelblock.rod_upgrade_kit.desc2: Can be found in suspicious blocks at Desert Pyramids and Desert Wells

item.angelblock.limonite_sword.desc3: High effectiveness on Cactus and Cobweb
item.angelblock.limonite_sword.desc6: On Sand: Plants cacti around aim point
item.angelblock.limonite_sword.desc7: (cacti destroy theirself when the player goes father then 10 blocks)
item.angelblock.limonite_sword.desc8: On other blocks: Places cobweb around or ahead the player
item.angelblock.limonite_sword.desc9: (cobweb destroys itself when the player goes father then 10 blocks)
item.angelblock.rendelithic_sword.desc2: Gives enemy Wither effect for 20 sec
item.angelblock.rendelithic_sword.desc4: Sets a fire around or ahead the player

item.angelblock.diamithic_pickaxe.desc4: (drops any blocks if player is sitting)

Enhanced Mode ON: drops up to 9 blocks per time

item.angelblock.lapis_hoe.desc4: Enhanced Mode ON: drops blocks of 3x3x3 cube per time
item.angelblock.lapis_hoe.desc6: Enhanced Mode ON: transforms horizontal square 5x3 blocks

item.angelblock.rendelithic_shovel.desc4: Enhanced Mode ON: drops up to 9 blocks per time

item.angelblock.diamithic_axe.desc3: Doesn't drop blocks which hold falling block above player
item.angelblock.diamithic_axe.desc4: (drops any blocks if player is sitting)
item.angelblock.diamithic_axe.desc5: Enhanced Mode ON: drops blocks of 3x3x3 cube per time
item.angelblock.limonite_axe.desc3: (drops any blocks if player is sitting)
item.angelblock.limonite_axe.desc4: Enhanced Mode ON: drops whole a sequence of compatible blocks below and above per time

item.angelblock.ancient_rod.desc6: Farmland: plants beet, potato, wheat or carrots
item.angelblock.ancient_rod.desc8: Dirt: plants a fern or sweet berry bush
item.angelblock.marine_rod.desc2: Pit between two farm type blocks: places water
item.angelblock.marine_rod.desc7: Clay near water: plants a small drip leaf
item.angelblock.fire_rod.desc2: Glow Stone: destroys and drops 4 Blaze Powders
item.angelblock.fire_rod.desc4: White Wool: destroys dropping 2-4 Strings and 0-2 Bone Meals
item.angelblock.fire_rod.desc5: Color Wool: destroys dropping 2-4 Strings and 0-2 Dyes
item.angelblock.fire_rod.desc8: Lava flowing on Obsidian -> Lava source
item.angelblock.fire_rod.desc9: Shroomlight -> Crimson Stem or Warped Stem
item.angelblock.amethyst_rod.desc7: Drip Stone Block: places a Glow Litchen
item.angelblock.end_rod.desc2: End Stone (upper face): plants a Chorus Flower
item.angelblock.end_rod.desc3: Tuff: destroys and drops 0-9 Gun Powders
item.angelblock.end_rod.desc5: Flowing Lava (not on Obsidian) -> End Stone
item.angelblock.end_rod.desc7: Changes weather if player holds Flame Stone, Marine Crystal or Strength Pearl in offhand
item.angelblock.planter.desc2: Causes harvesting in area 5x3 blocks per time
item.angelblock.planter.desc4: Plants or fertilizes the most of plants towards the player direction
item.angelblock.planter.desc5: Second hand: seeds, planting stocks, bone meal (to fertilize), shears (to clear grass)
item.angelblock.track_layer.desc2: Sequence of blocks drop towards the player direction
item.angelblock.track_layer.desc4: Places blocks a player holds in second hand towards the player direction
item.angelblock.track_layer.desc5: Second hand: any rails, redstone wire, fences, walls
item.angelblock.builder.desc3: Places blocks a player holds in second hand towards the player direction
item.angelblock.builder.desc5: Blocks are placed to a cube 3x3x3 with an empty space in the center (to use a destroying potion)
item.angelblock.builder.desc6: Second hand: any non-falling solid blocks that are not entities
item.angelblock.ancient_magnetic_rod.des: Does the same as Ancient Rod + has Magnetic Mode
item.angelblock.marine_magnetic_rod.desc: Does the same as Marine Rod + has Magnetic Mode
item.angelblock.fire_magnetic_rod.desc1: Does the same as Fire Rod + has Magnetic Mode
item.angelblock.amethyst_magnetic_rod.de: Does the same as Amethyst Rod + has Magnetic Mode
item.angelblock.end_magnetic_rod.desc1: Does the same as End Rod + has Magnetic Mode
item.angelblock.strength_pearl.desc1: If in offhand use End Rod to evoke thunder
item.angelblock.strength_pearl.desc2: Can be found in Pillager Outpost, Mineshafts and Dangeons
item.angelblock.bios_diamond.desc1: Using it sets Absorption effect for 5 seconds
item.angelblock.bios_diamond.desc2: Can be found in Jungle Temples or drop from Green Diamond Ore blocks
item.angelblock.end_sapphire.desc1: Using it sets Levitation effect for 10 seconds
item.angelblock.end_sapphire.desc2: Can be found in End Cities
item.angelblock.flame_stone.desc1: If in offhand use End Rod for clear weather
item.angelblock.flame_stone.desc2: Can be found in Nether Fortresses
item.angelblock.marine_crystal.desc1: If in offhand use End Rod to evoke rain
item.angelblock.marine_crystal.desc2: Can be found in Ocean Ruins
item.angelblock.guardian_eye.desc1: Using it sets Night Vision effect for 1 minute
item.angelblock.guardian_eye.desc2: Can drop from killed Elder Guardian
item.angelblock.miner_figure.desc: Can be found in Mineshafts and Dangeons
item.angelblock.ancient_canine.desc: Can be found in Igloo and Ancient Cities
item.angelblock.evoker_amulet.desc1: Using it spawns Allays (up to 3 in a radius)
item.angelblock.evoker_amulet.desc2: Can be found in Woodland Mansions
item.angelblock.nether_bars.desc: Can be found in Bastion Remnants
item.angelblock.ancient_scroll.desc: Can be found in Stronghold libraries
block.angelblock.green_diamond_ore.desc: Use ancient rod on Diamond Ore to turn it into Green Diamond Ore
block.angelblock.angel_block.desc1: Despawns any monsters in 70 block radius
block.angelblock.angel_block.desc2: Using some items on the block (e.g. Gunpowder) excludes corresponding monster (Creeper) from despawn list
block.angelblock.angel_block.desc3: Using of Flint resets the despawn filter
block.angelblock.devil_block.desc1: Prevents monsters' deaths in 70 block radius
block.angelblock.devil_block.desc2: Using some items on the block (e.g. Gunpowder) spawns corresponding monster (Creeper) in 30 block radius
effect.angelblock.block_breaker_effect.d: Water (any) (if under another water block) -> Ice
Tuff: destroys and drops 0-9 Gun Powders
Diamond Block: destroys and drops 9 Diamond Powders
White Wool: destroys and drops 4 Strings
Glass: destroys and drops 0-4 Prismarine Shards
Sand near water: destroys and drops 4 Clays
Prismarine: destroys and drops 0-4 Prismarine Crystals
